Title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
Writer: Michael McCullers, Tom McGrath, Marla Frazee
Actors: Alec Baldwin, James Marsden, Amy Sedaris
Plot: In the sequel to DreamWorks Animation's Oscar®-nominated blockbuster comedy, the Templeton brothers--Tim (James Marsden, X-Men franchise) and his Boss Baby little bro Ted (Alec Baldwin)--have become adults and drifted away from each other. Tim is now a married stay-at-home dad. Ted is a hedge fund CEO. But a new boss baby with a cutting-edge approach and a can-do attitude is about to bring them together again.. and inspire a new family business.
